name: Asahi Songwon Colors Limited
summary: Asahi Songwon Colors Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and supplies phthalocyanine pigments and derivatives products in India. The company's product portfolio include CPC blue crude, beta blue, and alpha blue. Its products are used in downstream industries, such as paints, printing inks, and plastics. The company also exports its products. Asahi Songwon Colors Limited was founded in 1990 is headquartered in Ahmedabad, India.
